title: Veinminer crouch
description: Crouch + correct tool vein mining for connected identical ores, using BFS with a safe block cap and server-side config
body:
# Crouch Vein Miner

**Crouch Vein Miner** allows you to instantly break entire veins of connected identical ores simply by **sneaking and using the correct tool**.

It keeps vanilla behavior as intact as possible:

* You still must use the **correct tool** for the block to drop items
* It only triggers when the player is **actively sneaking (crouching)**
* **No new custom keybinds**, blocks, or enchantments are added
* It mines in a clean, logical outward radius using a **Breadth-First Search (BFS)** algorithm

## Features

* Instantly mines **connected identical ores**
* Triggers naturally without needing extra keybinds
* Uses predictable **BFS pathing** for block updates
* Includes a built-in **safe block cap** to protect server performance
* Works on **Fabric**
* Supports **dedicated servers**
* Also works in **singleplayer**

## Compatibility

This project has separate files for different Minecraft version lines:
Please download the file that matches your Minecraft version.

## Server / Client

On a dedicated server, this mod is intended to work with **server-side installation only** because it relies entirely on standard block-breaking behavior.

That means players generally **should not need to install the mod on their client** just to use the vein miner on your server.

It also works when installed in a normal singleplayer Fabric instance.

## Important Warning

If you increase the maximum block cap significantly in the server configuration, mining massive, modded ore clusters could cause **TPS drops or lag spikes**. 

The default limit is highly optimized to protect your server's performance, so it is **strongly recommended to test your hardware's limits** before raising the cap on an active world.
